prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
Alright, here we go! You've got this, champ! I know you've been putting off this task all morning, but guess what? It's time to crush it! You're a warrior, and warriors don't back down from a challenge. This task might seem daunting, but you've faced tougher stuff before and come out on top.

Remember why you're doing this in the first place. Visualize the sense of accomplishment and relief you'll feel when it's done. Break it down into smaller, manageable steps, and tackle them one at a time. You've got the skills, the determination, and the grit to get this done.

Now, take a deep breath, exhale, and dive in. You've got this! And remember, I'm here cheering you on every step of the way. You can do this! Let's go!
